seoTitle: Wilkur vs Willatook — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wilkur and Willatook. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wilkur and Willatook.
heading: Wilkur vs Willatook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wilkur, Victoria and Willatook, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilkur has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Willatook (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wilkur or Willatook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wilkur has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Willatook scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wilkur scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Willatook scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wilkur or Willatook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilkur has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
